common.footerText: © 2026 EMRE — THIS PAGE IS MADE OF 100% HAND-DRAWN CODE ✦

hero.text: A developer forging interfaces pixel by pixel, pulling superpowers out of code blocks. Here to make the web a more fun place!

panels.title: SUPERPOWER
panels.text: Turning complex designs into pixel-perfect, buttery-smooth interfaces. CSS is my spider-sense.

panels.title: MISSION
panels.text: Building fast, accessible web experiences that make users go "whoa!"

panels.title: SECRET IDENTITY
panels.text: Developer by day, retro game collector and comic book nerd by night.

projects.title: PROJECTS!
projects.sub: Click a panel to see the rest of the story! 💥

items.title: SPEEDY MARKET
items.blurb: E-commerce UI with live stock tracking.
items.detail: An e-commerce experience built with React + TypeScript, packed with 60fps micro-animations. Conversion rose 23% after the cart flow redesign. KAPOW!

items.title: PANELIX
items.detail: Live-streaming data over WebSocket, drag-and-drop widgets and dark mode. Renders 10,000+ row tables without breaking a sweat. ZOOM!

items.title: COMIC-UI
items.detail: 40+ accessible components, theming support and full keyboard navigation. Earned 2k stars on GitHub. WHAM!

items.title: WAYFINDER
items.detail: Drag-and-drop route building on a map, offline support and PWA install. A web experience that feels app-store native. VROOM!

items.title: SOUNDWAVE
items.detail: Waveform visualization with Web Audio API, chapter note sync and speed control. A feast for ears and eyes. BOOM!

items.title: PIXEL BRAWL
items.blurb: Retro mini game in the browser.
items.detail: Canvas-based 60fps platformer. Leaderboard, gamepad support and 8-bit sound effects. A pure fun project. ZAP!

items.title: SENIOR FRONTEND DEV — TECHCO
items.text: Leading the design system, rebuilding the product UI with a team of 8.

items.title: FRONTEND DEVELOPER — STARTUPX
items.text: From MVP to 1M users: performance work and component architecture.

items.title: JR. DEVELOPER — AGENCY
items.text: Dozens of campaign sites, first big animation projects and lots of coffee.

items.title: ORIGIN STORY
items.text: Computer Engineering graduation. Bitten by a radioactive keyboard.

contact.title: LET'S WORK TOGETHER
contact.text: Got a project? Need superhero reinforcements? Send the signal, I'll be right there!

form.name: NAME
form.success: POW! Message received. I'll be right back!
form.error: ZAP! Something went wrong. Try again.
form.messagePh: Tell me about a project, collab, or a BAM! idea...

game.title: BUG SQUASHER!
game.sub: Squash as many bugs as you can in 10 seconds! High score is saved. 💥

blog.sub: Every post is a cover. Every cover is an adventure.
